sections.paragraph:
ὑστέρημα, ατος, τό [ὑστερέω]

—1. ‘that which is lacking to meet requirements for sustenance’, lack, deficiency Lk 21:4; 1 Cor 16:17; 2 Cor 8:14; 9:12; 11:9.

—2. ‘that which remains to be made up or brought to full completion’, balance, remaining portion

—a. in commercial imagery, of service as expression of devotion: of beneficence awaiting completion Phil 2:30; of tribulations that still await Paul as he continues to render faithful service to Christ Col 1:24.

—b. of that which remains to be done in expression of faith and commitment 1 Th 3:10.
